snippets.snippet: Sy akan pilih homestay ini lg masa akan datang.

address.address1: Jl. Anoi itam Mata ie ~100 meter dari Mata ie resort

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.1/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.1/10 on value for money

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Children 0-10 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The atmosphere of the hotel right by the beach adds to the beauty and tranquility, especially listening to the sound of the waves crashing on the shore. The hotel is clean and fragrant, with all the amenities neat and tidy. I booked a deluxe room and thankfully received a family room without having to pay for an extra bed. The service was good as well, with free access to cold or hot drinking water. Overall, we will definitely stay here again next time.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.originalComment: suasana hotel tepat dipinggir pantai menambah suasana  semakin indah dan tenang apalagi mendengar suara deburan ombak yg menghempas pantai, hotelnya bersih dan harum semua perlengkapan rapi dan bersih, saya pesan kamr deluxe alhamdulillah dpt yg family room dan tanpa nambah biaya extra bed , pelayanannya jg ok , bebas ambil air minum dingin atau panas.pokonya lain wkt kita nginap disini lg .

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room facing the sea has a window to see the sunrise, it has a swing, it's very comfortable.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

comments.originalComment: Kamar menghadap laut ,bisa lihat sunrise ada jendelanya ,ada ayunannya ,nyaman banget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Seaside location, the sound of the waves is calming and feels like a real vacation. The place is clean and comfortable, the owners of the accommodation are friendly and informative. I love it!
comments.originalComment: Lokasi tepi laut, debur suara ombak buat tenang dan berasa banget lagi liburan. Tempatnya bersih dan nyaman, pemilik penginapan berada di  lokasi ramah dan informatif. Sukaaaaaaa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The bed is great
The view is great
The hospitality is great
The cleanliness is great
The location is great
Overall, it's great!
comments.originalComment:
Tempat tidur nya mantap
Pemandangan mantap
Keramahan mantap
Kebersihan mantap
Lokasi mantap
Pokoknya mantap la

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Accommodations with a view directly overlooking the open sea that is extraordinarily beautiful with a gentle breeze.
comments.reviewTitle: Clean with an extraordinary sea view.
comments.originalTitle: Bersih dengan pemandangan laut yg luar biasa
comments.originalComment: Penginapan yang pemandangan nya langsung menuju lautan lepas yang sangat luar biasa bagus dengan angin sepoi-sepoi nya
